(b) The department shall consult with the motorcycle safety advisory board regarding any proposal to contract under this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 662. Motorcycle Operator Training & Safety
##### § 662.005 — Contracts

(a) The department may contract with qualified persons, including institutions of higher education, as necessary to achieve the purposes of this chapter.

(b) The department shall consult with the motorcycle safety advisory board regarding any proposal to contract under this section.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 270 (S.B.478), Sec. 7, eff. January 1, 2024.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may contract with qualified persons, including institutions of higher education, as necessary to achieve the purposes of this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall consult with the motorcycle safety advisory board regarding any proposal to contract under this section.
